symptom_description: Flue gas oxygen (`O2`) levels abnormally low (`< 55%%`) due to steam displacement. Boiler struggling to maintain `44 PSI` header pressure.
root_cause: Waterside scale accumulation (`> 0.05 inch thick`) caused localized insulating effect, leading to tube metal overheating (`126°C`) and stress rupture.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to `105°C` (`112°C`).
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Fuel pressure switch (`69 PSI` setpoint) constantly tripping during high fire. Burner hunting and failing to stabilize.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped (`0.003 inch`) on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic (`P/N 8289-B`), calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Pilot Electrode Kit, UV Scanner Lens Cleaning Swabs, Burner Front Plate Gasket

symptom_description: Pilot ignition spark clicking (`hissing`) but main gas valve fails to open. Flame scanner signal strength reading `12%` weak (`< 230V Volts DC`).
root_cause: UV flame scanner lens heavily fouled (`0.19 inch` buildup) with soot and oil film, causing weak flame signal that dropped below holding threshold (`480V +/- 4% V`) of safety relay.
action_taken: Cleaned UV flame scanner lens with alcohol swab (`Spec-593`), adjusted ignition electrode spark gap to `1/8 inch`, verified pilot flame signal strength (`3.5V DC`), and checked complete firing sequence.
parts_used: UV Flame Scanner Sensor Head, Ignition Electrode & Porcelain Assembly, High-Voltage Ignition Wire

symptom_description: Visual inspection shows `79%%` of tube passes bridged solid with scale. Acid clean required.
root_cause: Failure of the automatic surface blowdown controller (probe coated with `0.11 inch` scale) allowed TDS to climb to `24 ppm ppm`.
action_taken: Replaced coated conductivity probe (`P/N 9710-X`), recalibrated auto-blowdown valve (`28 Hz` cycles/hr), and mechanically punched all firetubes (`2.1 ft` reach).
parts_used: Conductivity Probe, Blowdown Valve Actuator, Tube Punching Brushes (Set of 3)

symptom_description: Constant drip (`605 gpm`) from safety valve drain hole, indicating seat is scored or scale-fouled.
root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion (`0.007 inch` groove) across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Installed new factory-calibrated and sealed safety relief valve (`Spec-943`), re-supported discharge vent pipe to ensure zero weight on valve body, and verified reseating tightness.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Boiler making distinct popping and kettling sounds (`growling`) from waterside during high fire operation. Bottom blowdown discharging gradual heavy scale chips.
root_cause: Condensate return contaminated with process calcium (`60 ppm ppm hardness`) from a leaking heat exchanger.
action_taken: Located and repaired leaking process heat exchanger (`P/N 5636-X`), acid washed boiler waterside (`61 lbs gal` acid), and re-passivated metal surfaces.
parts_used: Process Heat Exchanger Tube Bundle, Muriatic Acid (55 Gal), Passivation Chemical

symptom_description: Burner flame pulsating and rumbling (`high-pitched squealing`) inside combustion chamber (`0.48` vibration on front plate). High CO emissions (`> 36 ppm ppm`) on stack analyzer.
root_cause: Ignition electrode spark gap misaligned (`0.015 inch`) or porcelain insulator cracked, preventing reliable high-voltage pilot ignition arc (`480V +/- 4% kV`).
action_taken: Replaced main gas solenoid valve coil (`P/N 5198-B`) and faulty modulating servo motor (`Spec-353`), reset gas pressure regulator to `14 inches WC`, and performed multi-point combustion efficiency tuning (`O2 set at 3.5%`).
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Flame safeguard controller (`FSG`) locked out on primary flame failure during ignition sequence. Burner blower motor running but zero flame establishment.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped (`0.010 inch`) on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic (`P/N 5156-B`), calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Pilot Electrode Kit, UV Scanner Lens Cleaning Swabs, Burner Front Plate Gasket

symptom_description: Fuel pressure switch (`63 PSI` setpoint) constantly tripping during high fire. Burner hunting and failing to stabilize.
root_cause: UV flame scanner lens heavily fouled (`0.08 inch` buildup) with soot and oil film, causing weak flame signal that dropped below holding threshold (`460V +/- 2% V`) of safety relay.
action_taken: Cleaned UV flame scanner lens with alcohol swab (`Spec-240`), adjusted ignition electrode spark gap to `1/8 inch`, verified pilot flame signal strength (`3.5V DC`), and checked complete firing sequence.
parts_used: UV Flame Scanner Sensor Head, Ignition Electrode & Porcelain Assembly, High-Voltage Ignition Wire

symptom_description: Loud persistent hissing and steam escaping sound (`hissing`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation (`< 123°C` stack temp).
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs (`Spec-579`) as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Constant drip (`395 gpm`) from safety valve drain hole, indicating seat is scored or scale-fouled.
root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion (`0.007 inch` groove) across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Installed new factory-calibrated and sealed safety relief valve (`P/N 6624-B`), re-supported discharge vent pipe to ensure zero weight on valve body, and verified reseating tightness.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`2.3 ft` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `109`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Localized waterside oxygen pitting corrosion (`0.12 inch` deep) inside fire tubes due to intermittent failure of boiler feedwater deaerator (`153°C` operation) / oxygen scavenger chemical dosing.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test (`81 PSI`), reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes (`P/N 9945-REV2`), and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Seamless Steel Boiler Tubes 2.5-inch OD (Bundle of 4), Refractory Door Rope Gasket Kit, Tubesheet Ferrules

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test (`69 ft-lbs` pull) or opened `15.9 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Improper pipe support on discharge vent piping exerted mechanical binding twisting strain (`368 in-lbs`) on safety valve body, distorting internal seat alignment.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly (`P/N 3008-REV2`), renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: NBBI Certified Safety Valve 2-inch, Spiral Wound Gasket, High-Tensile Studs & Nuts

symptom_description: Conductivity of boiler water unexpectedly low (`0.51 Mega-ohms uS/cm`) despite high chemical feed, indicating massive dilution from makeup water.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation (`< 95°C` stack temp).
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs (`Spec-864`) as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Waterside inspection through handholes reveals `0.14 inch` thick hard calcium/silicate mineral scale crust on fire tube surfaces and furnace tube sheet.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`374 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-435`) through boiler waterside loop for `9649` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Flame safeguard controller (`FSG`) locked out on primary flame failure during ignition sequence. Burner blower motor running but zero flame establishment.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped (`0.014 inch`) on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic (`P/N 7678-X`), calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Pilot Electrode Kit, UV Scanner Lens Cleaning Swabs, Burner Front Plate Gasket
